message:
🐛 Fix OPA card showing 'Not installed' for slow clusters with Gatekeeper (#1466)

Two fixes:
- Increase Phase 1 namespace check timeout from 8s to 15s (slow clusters
  like vllm-d and platform-eval need >10s for API responses)
- Never downgrade a known-installed cluster to 'Not installed' when the
  check times out — preserve the cached installed status and still queue
  the cluster for Phase 2 detail fetch

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
